docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT AS TO CLAIMANT SANDRA URBINA ONLY FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA (FORFEITURE) URBINA, SANDRA A

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION AS TO CLAIMANT SANDRA URBINA ONLY. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $93.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT SANDRA URBINA. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
